system.notes: Sacrificial ceramic-metallic plates (~10 cm each) that reduce damage and flake away; max added Armor equals the vehicle's Body. Customization-only (no Skill Test, 6 hrs to fit/replace), reduces Load by (Body × 100). Tier cost/availability: L1 700¥ 8/14 days, L2 1,500¥ 12/14 days, L3 2,500¥ 14/21 days; Street Index 2. Rigger 2 p.127.
